about.sectionTitleHighlight: The team that makes an impact
about.sectionDesc: We work with a hybrid team that combines human talent with the power of artificial intelligence.

services.sectionDesc: Not just standard packages — we build tailored AI infrastructure together for enterprises and high-volume operations.
services.step1Desc: We listen to your current workflows together and identify bottlenecks that can be optimized with AI.
services.step2Desc: We map out the most suitable AI tools and automation scenarios for your needs together.
services.step3Desc: We set up systems, make API connections and test together.
services.step4Desc: We teach your team how to use the system and deliver it turnkey.
services.ctaDesc: Contact us directly for our services, consulting requests or brand collaborations.

aiFactory.desc: A premium community providing ready-to-use automation templates for solo-entrepreneurs and freelancers. Launch your business and secure your place in the AI revolution.

corporateTrainings.desc: We lead the integration process for companies of all sizes, from international holdings to SMEs. Introduce your team to AI and stay years ahead of the competition.
corporateTrainings.benefit1: Up to 3x increase in employee productivity
corporateTrainings.heroImgDesc: Building the future of organizational structures together.
corporateTrainings.refsDesc: We have provided AI training and consultancy services to leading institutions and organizations.
corporateTrainings.client1Desc: Organized two-day AI tools and automation workshops twice.
corporateTrainings.client2Desc: Held a 6-hour online training series (5 sessions, 120 participants) alongside 1-on-1 consultancy.
corporateTrainings.client3Desc: Organized exclusive AI tools training session.
corporateTrainings.client5Desc: Organized seller trainings as the only official instructor of GittiGidiyor Academy.
corporateTrainings.client6Desc: Store opening and seller training reached over 15,000 students.
corporateTrainings.galleryDesc: Glimpses from our hands-on workshops where participants experienced AI tools live.
corporateTrainings.feat1Desc: Instead of standard courses, we prepare content specifically for your company, departments, and goals.
corporateTrainings.feat2Desc: Not just theory; we bring practical tools to the field that your employees can use instantly.
corporateTrainings.feat3Desc: We teach decision-makers how to employ AI as a strategic growth argument.
